original: Slightly less popular as a prank dish than its strawberry counterpart, this lemon cake roll enjoys similar sales as a method of cleaning up afterwards, as its citrus flavor hides a dose of targeted microsurgeons made to increase the eater’s height considerably.

You unwrap the cake roll from its foil pouch, resting on an inner paper backing that reads “Eat Me!”. The roll goes down in just a few bites, leaving the taste of lemons in your mouth while you wait for the results.

The world lurches as if you’d just stepped onto a falling elevator, nearly making you stumble. By the time you recover, the ground seems "+{var1}.numToText({var0})+" inch"+(1===o?"":"es")+" further away.
context: <<POS:08654823>> <<VARS:var0=o,var1=l.m>> output("\n\nThe world lurches as if you’d just stepped onto a falling elevator, nearly making you stumble. By the time you recover, the ground seems "+l.m.numToText(o)+" inch"+(1===o?"":"es")+" further away.")

original: You wait and wait, but nothing happens. You must not be able to get any taller.
In fact, you might even be a little shorter. Perhaps reality itself has decided to press back against your sky-scraping size.
{var0}+{var1}+" eats the loftcake to no effect.
context: <<POS:08655313>> <<VARS:var0=e.capitalA,var1=e.short>> output(e.capitalA+e.short+" eats the loftcake to no effect.")
